content.rendered:
We offer one stop amd turnkey projects for liquid bottling packaging production lines

Complete Line Filling Solutions

Customized Liquid Bottling Solutions

Npack serves as a comprehensive provider of custom-engineered liquid filling solutions. We offer an extensive portfolio of high-performance equipment, including liquid filling machines, capping and sealing machines, packaging machines, labeling machines, emulsifier mixer machines, and bottling machines, all tailored to meet the demanding requirements of diverse liquid packaging and manufacturing industries.

With rich of experience in designing and building machinery and equipments, our expert technicians and engineering teams really get what different kinds of production need. It doesn’t matter which industry your business is in, we’re ready to create a custom bottling solutions that does more than just work for you — it’ll help your business grow and get better at what it does. We’re all about making filling and packaging machines that will be a key part of your business growing bigger.Follow our team and our solutions articals.

Turnkey Bottling Solutions

Shanghai Npack offers one-stop packaging solutions for your liquid bottling needs, covering the entire process from bottle manufacturing to final product storage and tracking systems. Our comprehensive solutions integrate a full line of bottling equipment, including bottle unscramblers, liquid filling machines, capping machines, and labeling applicators.

We provide a comprehensive range of equipment, from hand-operated and semi-automatic to fully automated systems. Our machines utilize various measuring techniques such as volumetric, gravity-fed, overflow, and weighing methods to handle diverse products—from thin liquids and thick sauces to jams, powders, and even solid or granular materials. The configuration of our bottling lines is equally adaptable, offering linear, rotary, and monoblock designs, each engineered to ensure precise and efficient packaging tailored to your production requirements.

Sauce Filling Solution

Here you can discover comprehensive bottling and packaging solutions and equipment for all types of food sauces, pastes, and jams.

Industrial Oil Filling Solution

We provide filling solutions for all types of industrial lubricants, including motor oil, lubricating oil, gear oil, engine oil, and grease.

Edible Oil Filling Solution

Here you can find filling solutions for all types of fluid edible oils, including olive oil, refined oil, corn oil, mustard oil, and more.

Wine&Liquor Filling Solution

We provide comprehensive filling solutions for liquor, juice, and other beverages, compatible with various packaging formats including PET bottles, tin cans, and glass bottles or jars.

Daily Chemicals Filling Solution

We provide specialized filling solutions for a wide range of daily chemical products, including detergent, bleach, shampoo, hand soap, dishwashing liquid, hand sanitizer, and deodorant.

Cosmetics&Pernsonal Care Filling Solution

We offer precision filling solutions for a complete range of cosmetic products, including moisturizers, serums, toners, body lotions, creams, and other skincare formulations.

Filling Solution By Container

You will find a tailored filling solution here, designed to meet your specific container requirements. Should you have further questions or require additional information, please feel free to contact our experienced team. We are always ready to assist you!
